name: video-translator
description: AI-powered video dubbing desktop app for Mac

scripts.install-server: cd server && bash -c 'if command -v python3.11 >/dev/null 2>&1; then PY=python3.11; elif command -v python3.10 >/dev/null 2>&1; then PY=python3.10; else PY=python3; fi; [ ! -d venv ] && "$PY" -m venv venv; . venv/bin/activate && pip install -U pip && pip install -r requirements.txt'
scripts.install-all: npm run install-client && npm run install-server && npm install
scripts.electron-dev: concurrently "cd server && ./run.sh" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:8000/health && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron ."
scripts.dist: npm run build-client && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist-x64: npm run build-client && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron-builder --mac --x64
